docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARCUS EVANS, INC. SERVED MAY-06-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INDUSTRI-MATEMATIK AMERICAN OPERATIONS, INC.
